description: Flip targetpkg/extra.go's `//go:build` constraint from `linux || darwin` (included on test platforms) to `!linux && !darwin` (excluded). The exclusion removes the Extra type from targetpkg's exported surface, changing targetpkg's gcexportdata. Every consumer of targetpkg observes a new DepTypeDigest. Expected cascade: {targetpkg, c1, c2, c3} — the 3 consumers plus targetpkg itself.
